§6ZIRNOX Nuclear Reactor§f

§aYour first nuclear reactor — cheap, simple, and safe enough for beginners!§f

The §bZIRNOX GCR§f (Gas-Cooled Reactor) is the first reactor most players build. It is a single-block machine with fixed capacity, not a modular multiblock. It produces §esuper dense steam§f and runs on CO2 coolant.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine, 30s, 100 HE/t):
§b• 4×§f Steel Shell
§b• 8×§f Steel Pipe
§b• 8×§f Boron Ingot
§b• 16×§f Graphite Ingot
§b• 16×§f Rubber Bar
§b• 16×§f Concrete
§b• 4×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6GUI Overview§f:
§b• Fuel Rod Assembly§f — place fuel rods; center rods deplete faster
§b• Control Rod Button§f — on/off
§b• Temperature§f — max §e800°C§f
§b• Pressure§f — max §e30 BAR§f
§b• CO2§f — §e16,000 mB§f capacity
§b• Water§f — §e32,000 mB§f
§b• Steam§f — §e8,000 mB§f super dense steam

§6Operation§f: Needs CO2 coolant, water input, external turbines. See §bZIRNOX Operation & Fuel Reprocessing§f quest for full details on fuel management, efficiency, reprocessing, and pros/cons.
